# sdwan_archive_feature_template (Data Source)

This data source can read the archive feature template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sdwan_archive_feature_template" "example" {
  id = "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The id of the feature template
- `name` (String) The name of the feature template

### Read-Only

- `archival_interval` (Number) Set how often to archive full running configuration
- `archival_interval_variable` (String) Variable name
- `description` (String) The description of the feature template
- `device_types` (Set of String) List of supported device types
- `path_to_archive_file_directory` (String) Set the path to the archive file directory (ftp://file-path, scp://user@host:file-path, /)
- `path_to_archive_file_directory_variable` (String) Variable name
- `ssh_key_file` (String) Set name of SSH private key file on local device
- `ssh_key_file_variable` (String) Variable name
- `template_type` (String) The template type
- `version` (Number) The version of the feature template
- `vpn_id` (Number) Set VPN in which archiver server is located
- `vpn_id_variable` (String) Variable name
